metadata.name: EZ_SERVICE_CHECKPOINTS
metadata.comment: This fact-based convenience table contains decoded service Checkpoint events from various applicable staking contracts and programs, and includes a join on the `dim_registry_metadata` table for additional details pertaining to each service_id, such as name and description.

BLOCKCHAIN.name: BLOCKCHAIN
BLOCKCHAIN.comment: Blockchain, Network, or Platform the transaction or event occurs on.

BLOCK_NUMBER.name: BLOCK_NUMBER
BLOCK_NUMBER.comment: The block number at which the transaction is finalized.

BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.name: BLOCK_TIMESTAMP
BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.comment: The block timestamp of this transaction in UTC

TX_HASH.name: TX_HASH
TX_HASH.comment: Transaction hash is a unique 66-character identifier that is generated when a transaction is executed.

ORIGIN_FUNCTION_SIGNATURE.name: ORIGIN_FUNCTION_SIGNATURE
ORIGIN_FUNCTION_SIGNATURE.comment: The function signature of this transaction.

ORIGIN_FROM_ADDRESS.name: ORIGIN_FROM_ADDRESS
ORIGIN_FROM_ADDRESS.comment: The address that initiates the transaction. If a transaction generates multiple events, all of them will have the same origin_from_address.

ORIGIN_TO_ADDRESS.name: ORIGIN_TO_ADDRESS
ORIGIN_TO_ADDRESS.comment: The address that receives the transaction. If a transaction generates multiple events, all of them will have the same origin_to_address.

CONTRACT_ADDRESS.name: CONTRACT_ADDRESS
CONTRACT_ADDRESS.comment: The address of the contract interacted with.

EVENT_NAME.name: EVENT_NAME
EVENT_NAME.comment: The name of the event.

SERVICE_ID.name: SERVICE_ID
SERVICE_ID.comment: The unique identifier of the registered Service.

NAME.name: NAME
NAME.comment: The registered name of the Unit (Agent, Component) or Service.

DESCRIPTION.name: DESCRIPTION
DESCRIPTION.comment: The registered description of the Unit (Agent, Component) or Service.

REWARD_UNADJ.name: REWARD_UNADJ
REWARD_UNADJ.comment: The value of the reward, non-decimal adjusted.

REWARD.name: REWARD
REWARD.comment: The value of the reward, decimal adjusted.

EPOCH.name: EPOCH
EPOCH.comment: The period or unit of time.

EPOCH_LENGTH.name: EPOCH_LENGTH
EPOCH_LENGTH.comment: The length of the period or unit of time.

TOTAL_AVAILABLE_REWARDS_UNADJ.name: TOTAL_AVAILABLE_REWARDS_UNADJ
TOTAL_AVAILABLE_REWARDS_UNADJ.comment: The total rewards available in the event, non-decimal adjusted.

TOTAL_AVAILABLE_REWARDS.name: TOTAL_AVAILABLE_REWARDS
TOTAL_AVAILABLE_REWARDS.comment: The total rewards available in the event, decimal adjusted.

PROGRAM_NAME.name: PROGRAM_NAME
PROGRAM_NAME.comment: The name of the staking program.

EZ_SERVICE_CHECKPOINTS_ID.name: EZ_SERVICE_CHECKPOINTS_ID
EZ_SERVICE_CHECKPOINTS_ID.comment: The unique identifier for each row in the table.

INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.name: INSERTED_TIMESTAMP
INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The utc timestamp at which the row was inserted into the table.

MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.name: MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP
MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The utc timestamp at which the row was last modified.

metadata.name: FACT_PURCHASES
metadata.comment: This table contains fact-based records of purchase transactions within the UnifAI protocol. It captures essential information about each purchase event, including transaction details and user information.

CREATED_AT_TIMESTAMP.name: CREATED_AT_TIMESTAMP
CREATED_AT_TIMESTAMP.comment: The timestamp when the transaction was created.

TX_HASH.name: TX_HASH
TX_HASH.comment: The unique transaction hash that identifies the transaction on the blockchain.

CHAIN.name: CHAIN
CHAIN.comment: The blockchain network on which the transaction occurred.

STATUS.name: STATUS
STATUS.comment: The status of the transaction, indicating whether it was successful, pending, or failed.

FROM_ADDRESS.name: FROM_ADDRESS
FROM_ADDRESS.comment: The blockchain address from which the transaction was initiated.

TO_ADDRESS.name: TO_ADDRESS
TO_ADDRESS.comment: The blockchain address to which the transaction was directed.

TOKEN_AMOUNT.name: TOKEN_AMOUNT
TOKEN_AMOUNT.comment: The amount of tokens involved in the transaction.

TOKEN_SYMBOL.name: TOKEN_SYMBOL
TOKEN_SYMBOL.comment: The symbol of the token involved in the transaction.

TOKEN_VALUE.name: TOKEN_VALUE
TOKEN_VALUE.comment: The value of the tokens involved in the transaction, typically denominated in a stable currency or fiat equivalent.

INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.name: INSERTED_TIMESTAMP
INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The utc timestamp at which the row was inserted into the table.

MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.name: MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP
MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The utc timestamp at which the row was last modified.

FACT_PURCHASES_ID.name: FACT_PURCHASES_ID
FACT_PURCHASES_ID.comment: The unique identifier for each row in the table.

metadata.name: DIM_DEX_LIQUIDITY_POOLS
metadata.comment: A comprehensive dim table holding blockchain and platform specific decentralized exchange pools.

BLOCKCHAIN.name: BLOCKCHAIN
BLOCKCHAIN.comment: Blockchain, Network, or Platform the token price is recorded on.

PLATFORM.name: PLATFORM
PLATFORM.comment: The protocol or platform that the liquidity pool belongs to or swap occurred on.

CREATION_BLOCK.name: CREATION_BLOCK
CREATION_BLOCK.comment: The block number of when this pool was created.

CREATION_TIME.name: CREATION_TIME
CREATION_TIME.comment: The block timestamp of when this pool was created.

CREATION_TX.name: CREATION_TX
CREATION_TX.comment: The transaction where this contract was created.

FACTORY_ADDRESS.comment: The address that created or deployed this pool, where available.

POOL_ADDRESS.name: POOL_ADDRESS
POOL_ADDRESS.comment: The contract address for the liquidity pool.

POOL_NAME.name: POOL_NAME
POOL_NAME.comment: The name of the liquidity pool, where available. In some cases, the pool name is a concatenation of symbols or token addresses.

TOKENS.name: TOKENS
TOKENS.comment: The address for the token included in the liquidity pool, as a JSON object

SYMBOLS.name: SYMBOLS
SYMBOLS.comment: The symbol for the token included in the liquidity pool, as a JSON object, where available.

DECIMALS.name: DECIMALS
DECIMALS.comment: The number of decimals for the token included in the liquidity pool, as a JSON object, where available.

INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.name: INSERTED_TIMESTAMP
INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The utc timestamp at which the row was inserted into the table.

MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.name: MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP
MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The utc timestamp at which the row was last modified.

DIM_DEX_LIQUIDITY_POOLS_ID.comment: The unique identifier for each row in the table.

BLOCKCHAIN.name: BLOCKCHAIN
BLOCKCHAIN.comment: Blockchain, Network, or Platform the transaction or event occurs on.

BLOCK_NUMBER.name: BLOCK_NUMBER
BLOCK_NUMBER.comment: The block number at which the transaction is finalized.

BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.name: BLOCK_TIMESTAMP
BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.comment: The block timestamp of this transaction in UTC

TX_HASH.name: TX_HASH
TX_HASH.comment: Transaction hash is a unique 66-character identifier that is generated when a transaction is executed.

ORIGIN_FUNCTION_SIGNATURE.name: ORIGIN_FUNCTION_SIGNATURE
ORIGIN_FUNCTION_SIGNATURE.comment: The function signature of this transaction.

CONTRACT_ADDRESS.name: CONTRACT_ADDRESS
CONTRACT_ADDRESS.comment: The address of the contract interacted with.

EVENT_NAME.name: EVENT_NAME

SERVICE_ID.comment: The unique identifier of the registered Service.

ETH_AMOUNT.comment: The value of the asset, decimal adjusted.

metadata.name: FACT_DEX_SWAPS
metadata.comment: A comprehensive fact table holding blockchain and platform specific decentralized exchange swaps. This table contains dex swaps from Arbitrum, Avalanche, Base, BSC, Gnosis, Ethereum, Optimism, Polygon, Osmosis, Solana, and Near.

BLOCKCHAIN.name: BLOCKCHAIN
BLOCKCHAIN.comment: Blockchain, Network, or Platform the token price is recorded on.

PLATFORM.name: PLATFORM
PLATFORM.comment: The name of the dex or swap platform

BLOCK_NUMBER.name: BLOCK_NUMBER
BLOCK_NUMBER.comment: Also known as block height. The block number, which indicates the length of the blockchain, increases after the addition of each new block.

BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.name: BLOCK_TIMESTAMP
BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.comment: The date and time at which the block was produced.

TX_HASH.name: TX_HASH
TX_HASH.comment: Transaction hash is a unique identifier that is generated when a transaction is executed.

CONTRACT_ADDRESS.name: CONTRACT_ADDRESS
CONTRACT_ADDRESS.comment: The contract address interacted with for the swap, typically the liquidity pool or router address, where applicable. Value may be NULL for certain chains, such as Osmosis and Near, where records occur at a different granularity such as one row per transaction rather than one row per event.

TRADER.name: TRADER
TRADER.comment: The address that initiated the swap.

TOKEN_IN.name: TOKEN_IN
TOKEN_IN.comment: The address of the token sent for swap.

AMOUNT_IN_RAW.name: AMOUNT_IN_RAW
AMOUNT_IN_RAW.comment: The unadjusted amount of tokens put into the swap.

TOKEN_OUT.name: TOKEN_OUT
TOKEN_OUT.comment: The address of the token being swapped to.

AMOUNT_OUT_RAW.name: AMOUNT_OUT_RAW
AMOUNT_OUT_RAW.comment: The unadjusted amount of tokens taken out of or received from the swap.

INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.name: INSERTED_TIMESTAMP
INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The utc timestamp at which the row was inserted into the table.

MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.name: MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP
MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The utc timestamp at which the row was last modified.

FACT_DEX_SWAPS_ID.name: FACT_DEX_SWAPS_ID
FACT_DEX_SWAPS_ID.comment: The unique identifier for each row in the table.

DAY_OF_WEEK_NAME.comment: day of week name for DATE_DAY

WEEK_START_DATE.comment: date representing the start of the week for DATE_DAY

WEEK_END_DATE.name: WEEK_END_DATE

PRIOR_YEAR_WEEK_START_DATE.comment: date representing the start of the week for PRIOR_YEAR_DATE_DAY

PRIOR_YEAR_WEEK_END_DATE.name: PRIOR_YEAR_WEEK_END_DATE
PRIOR_YEAR_WEEK_END_DATE.comment: date representing the end of the week for PRIOR_YEAR_DATE_DAY

WEEK_OF_YEAR.name: WEEK_OF_YEAR
WEEK_OF_YEAR.comment: number representing the week of the year for DATE_DAY

ISO_WEEK_START_DATE.name: ISO_WEEK_START_DATE
ISO_WEEK_START_DATE.comment: ISO date representing the start of the week for DATE_DAY

ISO_WEEK_END_DATE.name: ISO_WEEK_END_DATE
ISO_WEEK_END_DATE.comment: ISO date representing the end of the week for DATE_DAY

PRIOR_YEAR_ISO_WEEK_START_DATE.name: PRIOR_YEAR_ISO_WEEK_START_DATE
PRIOR_YEAR_ISO_WEEK_START_DATE.comment: ISO date representing the start of the week for PRIOR_YEAR_DATE_DAY

PRIOR_YEAR_ISO_WEEK_END_DATE.name: PRIOR_YEAR_ISO_WEEK_END_DATE
PRIOR_YEAR_ISO_WEEK_END_DATE.comment: ISO date representing the end of the week for PRIOR_YEAR_DATE_DAY

ISO_WEEK_OF_YEAR.name: ISO_WEEK_OF_YEAR
ISO_WEEK_OF_YEAR.comment: number representing the ISO week of the year for DATE_DAY

PRIOR_YEAR_WEEK_OF_YEAR.name: PRIOR_YEAR_WEEK_OF_YEAR
PRIOR_YEAR_WEEK_OF_YEAR.comment: number representing the week of the year for PRIOR_YEAR_DATE_DAY

PRIOR_YEAR_ISO_WEEK_OF_YEAR.name: PRIOR_YEAR_ISO_WEEK_OF_YEAR
PRIOR_YEAR_ISO_WEEK_OF_YEAR.comment: number representing the ISO week of the year for PRIOR_YEAR_DATE_DAY

MONTH_OF_YEAR.name: MONTH_OF_YEAR
MONTH_OF_YEAR.comment: number representing the month of the year for DATE_DAY

MONTH_NAME.name: MONTH_NAME
MONTH_NAME.comment: month of year name for DATE_DAY

MONTH_NAME_SHORT.name: MONTH_NAME_SHORT
MONTH_NAME_SHORT.comment: month of year abbreviation for DATE_DAY

PRIOR_YEAR_MONTH_START_DATE.comment: first date of month for PRIOR_YEAR_DATE_DAY

PRIOR_YEAR_MONTH_END_DATE.comment: last date of month for PRIOR_YEAR_DATE_DAY

metadata.name: EZ_BRIDGE_ACTIVITY
metadata.comment: A comprehensive convenience table holding blockchain and platform specific bridge activity from event_logs, traces and transfers, including bridge deposits/withdrawals and transfers in/out on the following blockchains: Arbitrum, Avalanche, Base, Blast, BSC, Gnosis, Ethereum, Optimism, Polygon, Solana, Aptos, Near, Flow and more. This table also includes prices and token symbols, where available. Note: source_address and destination_address are intentionally case-sensitive where applicable, depending on the requirements of the network.

BLOCKCHAIN.name: BLOCKCHAIN
BLOCKCHAIN.comment: Blockchain, Network, or Platform the token bridge activity is recorded on.

PLATFORM.name: PLATFORM
PLATFORM.comment: The platform or protocol from which the bridge transaction or event originates.

BLOCK_NUMBER.name: BLOCK_NUMBER
BLOCK_NUMBER.comment: Also known as block height. The block number, which indicates the length of the blockchain, increases after the addition of each new block.

BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.name: BLOCK_TIMESTAMP
BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.comment: The date and time at which the block was produced.

TX_HASH.name: TX_HASH
TX_HASH.comment: Transaction hash is a unique identifier that is generated when a transaction is executed.

SOURCE_CHAIN.name: SOURCE_CHAIN
SOURCE_CHAIN.comment: The name of the blockchain network to which the assets are being bridged from.

DESTINATION_CHAIN.name: DESTINATION_CHAIN
DESTINATION_CHAIN.comment: The name of the blockchain network to which the assets are being bridged to.

BRIDGE_ADDRESS.name: BRIDGE_ADDRESS
BRIDGE_ADDRESS.comment: The address of the contract responsible for handling the bridge deposit or transfer. This contract mediates the transfer and ensures that assets are sent and received appropriately.

SOURCE_ADDRESS.name: SOURCE_ADDRESS
SOURCE_ADDRESS.comment: The address that initiated the bridge deposit or transfer. This address is the sender of the tokens/assets being bridged to the destination chain. This may be an EOA or contract address.

DESTINATION_ADDRESS.name: DESTINATION_ADDRESS
DESTINATION_ADDRESS.comment: The designated address set to receive the bridged tokens on the target chain after the completion of the bridge transaction. For non-evm chains, the hex address is decoded/encoded to match the data format of the destination chain, where possible. This may be an EOA or contract address.

DIRECTION.name: DIRECTION
DIRECTION.comment: Indicates the direction in which the assets are being bridged, out/outbound or in/inbound.

TOKEN_ADDRESS.name: TOKEN_ADDRESS
TOKEN_ADDRESS.comment: The address associated with the token that is being bridged. It provides a unique identifier for the token within its origin blockchain.

TOKEN_SYMBOL.name: TOKEN_SYMBOL
TOKEN_SYMBOL.comment: The symbol representing the token being bridged. This provides a shorthand representation of the token.

AMOUNT_RAW.name: AMOUNT_RAW
AMOUNT_RAW.comment: The raw, non-decimal adjusted amount of tokens involved in the bridge transaction. For Solana, these are decimal adjusted amounts.

AMOUNT.name: AMOUNT
AMOUNT.comment: The decimal adjusted amount of tokens involved in the bridge transaction, where available.

AMOUNT_USD.name: AMOUNT_USD
AMOUNT_USD.comment: The value of the bridged tokens in USD at the time of the bridge transaction, where available.

INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.name: INSERTED_TIMESTAMP
INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The utc timestamp at which the row was inserted into the table.

MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.name: MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP
MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The utc timestamp at which the row was last modified.

metadata.name: EZ_ENS_DOMAINS
metadata.comment: A convenience table with up-to-date details pertaining to ENS domains registered onchain. Note, records are derived directly from on-chain event logs only and may not be inclusive of off-chain activity.

LAST_REGISTERED_BLOCK.comment: The latest block number in which the domain was registered.

LAST_REGISTERED_TIMESTAMP.name: LAST_REGISTERED_TIMESTAMP
LAST_REGISTERED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The timestamp corresponding to the latest block in which the domain was registered.

LAST_REGISTERED_TX_HASH.comment: Transaction hash of the most recent domain registration event.

LAST_REGISTERED_CONTRACT.name: LAST_REGISTERED_CONTRACT
LAST_REGISTERED_CONTRACT.comment: The contract address responsible for the most recent domain registration.

MANAGER.comment: The address that currently manages the domain.

OWNER.name: OWNER
OWNER.comment: The address that currently owns the domain.

SET_ADDRESS.name: SET_ADDRESS
SET_ADDRESS.comment: The address that the domain currently resolves to.

ENS_SET.name: ENS_SET
ENS_SET.comment: Indicates if the domain has been set to an address.

ENS_SUBDOMAINS.name: ENS_SUBDOMAINS
ENS_SUBDOMAINS.comment: Any subdomains that are associated with the primary domain.

LABEL.name: LABEL
LABEL.comment: The label hash, which is a representation of the domain.

NODE.name: NODE
NODE.comment: A hash representing the ENS domain.

TOKEN_ID.name: TOKEN_ID
TOKEN_ID.comment: The ID of the token associated with the domain.

LAST_REGISTERED_COST.name: LAST_REGISTERED_COST
LAST_REGISTERED_COST.comment: The cost associated with the most recent registration of the domain.

LAST_REGISTERED_PREMIUM.name: LAST_REGISTERED_PREMIUM
LAST_REGISTERED_PREMIUM.comment: Any additional premium paid during the most recent registration of the domain.

RENEWAL_COST.name: RENEWAL_COST
RENEWAL_COST.comment: The cost to renew the domain's registration.

EXPIRATION_TIMESTAMP.name: EXPIRATION_TIMESTAMP
EXPIRATION_TIMESTAMP.comment: The timestamp at which the domain registration will expire.

EXPIRED.name: EXPIRED
EXPIRED.comment: Indicates if the domain registration has expired.

RESOLVER.name: RESOLVER
RESOLVER.comment: The address of the resolver contract that provides records for the domain.

PROFILE.name: PROFILE
PROFILE.comment: Profile information, such as avatars or social links, associated with the domain.

LAST_UPDATED.name: LAST_UPDATED

metadata.name: EZ_LENDING_REPAYMENTS
metadata.comment: A comprehensive table that contains events in which a borrower repays their loan (debt) across Arbitrum, Avalanche, Base, BSC, Gnosis, Ethereum, Optimism, and Polygon. Loans are repaid in the same asset borrowed, plus accrued interest. Borrowers can pay back their loan based on the USD price as they can borrow any of the available stable coins (USDC, DAI, USDT, etc.).

TOKEN_ADDRESS.comment: The address of the token associated with the lending action.

metadata.name: EZ_LENDING_LIQUIDATIONS
metadata.comment: A comprehensive table that contains all blockchain and platform specific liquidations. This table contains liquidation events in which a borrower's collateral asset is liquidated across Arbitrum, Avalanche, Base, BSC, Gnosis, Ethereum, Optimism, and Polygon. Liquidations occur when a borrower's health factor goes below 1 due to their collateral value not properly covering their loan/debt value. This might happen when the collateral decreases in value or the borrowed debt increases in value against each other. This collateral vs loan value ratio is shown in the health factor. In a liquidation, up to 50% of a borrower's debt is repaid and that value + liquidation fee is taken from the collateral available, so after a liquidation the amount liquidated from one's debt is repaid.

PLATFORM.name: PLATFORM
PLATFORM.comment: The specific protocol where lending event occurred.

BLOCK_NUMBER.comment: The block number at which the transaction is finalized.

CONTRACT_ADDRESS.name: CONTRACT_ADDRESS
CONTRACT_ADDRESS.comment: The address interacted with for a given event.

PROTOCOL_MARKET.name: PROTOCOL_MARKET
PROTOCOL_MARKET.comment: The protocol's specific lending asset token, ie cWBTC or aETHUni.

LIQUIDATOR.name: LIQUIDATOR
LIQUIDATOR.comment: The address that initiated the liquidation call.

BORROWER.name: BORROWER
BORROWER.comment: Address that initiated the borrow event.

COLLATERAL_TOKEN.name: COLLATERAL_TOKEN
COLLATERAL_TOKEN.comment: The asset provided as collateral, which can be liquidated.

COLLATERAL_TOKEN_SYMBOL.name: COLLATERAL_TOKEN_SYMBOL
COLLATERAL_TOKEN_SYMBOL.comment: The symbol of the token associated with the lending action.

AMOUNT.comment: The decimal adjusted amount of tokens involved in the lending transaction, where available.

AMOUNT_USD.name: AMOUNT_USD
AMOUNT_USD.comment: The value of the tokens in USD at the time of the lending transaction, where available.

DEBT_TOKEN.comment: The debt asset, which the user borrowed.

metadata.name: EZ_LENDING_FLASHLOANS
metadata.comment: A comprehensive table that contains all blockchain and platform specific flashloans. This table contains deposit events across Arbitrum, Avalanche, Base, BSC, Gnosis, Ethereum, Optimism, and Polygon. Flash loans are a feature designed for developers, due to the technical knowledge required to execute one. Flash Loans allow you to borrow any available amount of assets without providing any collateral, as long as the liquidity is returned to the protocol within one block transaction.

metadata.name: EZ_LENDING_DEPOSITS
metadata.comment: A comprehensive table that contains all blockchain and platform specific deposits. This table contains deposit eventss across Arbitrum, Avalanche, Base, BSC, Gnosis, Ethereum, Optimism, and Polygon. A user deposits their preferred asset and amount. After depositing, users earn passive income based on the market borrowing demand. Additionally, depositing allows users to borrow by using their deposited assets as a collateral. Any interest earned by depositing funds helps offset the interest rate accumulated by borrowing.

metadata.name: EZ_OLAS_BONDING
metadata.comment: This convenience table tracks OLAS token bonding events and the amount of OLAS bonded, in addition to other related details. The Autonolas Tokenomics bonding mechanism enables users holding supported LP-pair assets to deposit them into the Autonolas depository smart contract. In return, they receive OLAS tokens at a discount relative to the price quoted on the relevant DEX after a vesting time. For more information, please visit Olas' [Official Documentation](https://docs.autonolas.network/protocol/tokenomics/#incentivizing-software-developers).

BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.comment: The date and time at which the block began.

CHAIN_ID.name: CHAIN_ID

TX_COUNT.name: TX_COUNT
TX_COUNT.comment: The number of transactions that occurred during a block.

PROPOSER_ADDRESS.name: PROPOSER_ADDRESS
PROPOSER_ADDRESS.comment: The address of the validator that proposed the block.

VALIDATOR_HASH.name: VALIDATOR_HASH
VALIDATOR_HASH.comment: The root hash of the new validator set.

MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.name: MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP
MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The utc timestamp at which the row was last modified.

metadata.name: FACT_SERVICE_EVENTS
metadata.comment: This fact-based table contains all emitted events related to registered services and service multisigs within the OLAS protocol. For EVMs, this is accomplished by joining all events where the transaction's `origin_to_address` = `multisig_address` to showcase the onchain interactions with each service. If a service does not have an associated multisig, it will not be included in this table. Various chain-specific columns may be null, as this table joins together the EVM and SVM.

BLOCKCHAIN.name: BLOCKCHAIN
BLOCKCHAIN.comment: Blockchain, Network, or Platform the transaction or event occurs on.

BLOCK_NUMBER.name: BLOCK_NUMBER
BLOCK_NUMBER.comment: The block number at which the transaction is finalized.

BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.name: BLOCK_TIMESTAMP
BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.comment: The block timestamp of this transaction in UTC

TX_HASH.name: TX_HASH
TX_HASH.comment: Transaction hash is a unique 66-character identifier that is generated when a transaction is executed.

ORIGIN_FUNCTION_SIGNATURE.name: ORIGIN_FUNCTION_SIGNATURE
ORIGIN_FUNCTION_SIGNATURE.comment: The function signature of this transaction.

ORIGIN_FROM_ADDRESS.name: ORIGIN_FROM_ADDRESS
ORIGIN_FROM_ADDRESS.comment: The address that initiates the transaction. If a transaction generates multiple events, all of them will have the same origin_from_address.

ORIGIN_TO_ADDRESS.name: ORIGIN_TO_ADDRESS
ORIGIN_TO_ADDRESS.comment: The address that receives the transaction. If a transaction generates multiple events, all of them will have the same origin_to_address.

CONTRACT_ADDRESS.name: CONTRACT_ADDRESS
CONTRACT_ADDRESS.comment: The address of the contract interacted with.

MULTISIG_ADDRESS.name: MULTISIG_ADDRESS
MULTISIG_ADDRESS.comment: The address of the multi-signature wallet, typically a GnosisSafe.

SERVICE_ID.name: SERVICE_ID
SERVICE_ID.comment: The unique identifier of the registered Service.

TOPIC_0.name: TOPIC_0
TOPIC_0.comment: The non-decoded event input topics.

TOPIC_1.name: TOPIC_1
TOPIC_1.comment: The non-decoded event input topics.

TOPIC_2.name: TOPIC_2
TOPIC_2.comment: The non-decoded event input topics.

TOPIC_3.name: TOPIC_3
TOPIC_3.comment: The non-decoded event input topics.

DATA.name: DATA
DATA.comment: The non-decoded, raw data emitted from an event.

SEGMENTED_DATA.name: SEGMENTED_DATA
SEGMENTED_DATA.comment: The raw emitted event log data, segmented into a variant column for further manual decoding and analysis.

FACT_SERVICE_EVENTS_ID.name: FACT_SERVICE_EVENTS_ID
FACT_SERVICE_EVENTS_ID.comment: The unique identifier for each row in the table.

INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.name: INSERTED_TIMESTAMP
INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The utc timestamp at which the row was inserted into the table.

MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.name: MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP
MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The utc timestamp at which the row was last modified.

metadata.name: EZ_SERVICE_REGISTRATIONS
metadata.comment: This convenience table contains fact-based records of service registrations within the OLAS protocol, capturing essential information about each registered service event and includes a join on the `dim_registry_metadata` table for additional details pertaining to each service_id, such as name and description. Various chain-specific columns may be null, as this table joins together the EVM and SVM.

ORIGIN_TO_ADDRESS.name: ORIGIN_TO_ADDRESS
ORIGIN_TO_ADDRESS.comment: The address that receives the transaction. If a transaction generates multiple events, all of them will have the same origin_to_address.

EVENT_NAME.comment: The name of the event.

metadata.name: EZ_LENDING_WITHDRAWS
metadata.comment: A comprehensive table contains transactions in which a user withdraws liquidity across Arbitrum, Avalanche, Base, BSC, Gnosis, Ethereum, Optimism, and Polygon. Users need to make sure there is enough liquidity (not borrowed) in order to withdraw, if this is not the case, users need to wait for more liquidity from depositors or borrowers repaying.

PLATFORM.name: PLATFORM
PLATFORM.comment: The specific protocol where lending event occurred.

BLOCK_NUMBER.name: BLOCK_NUMBER
BLOCK_NUMBER.comment: The block number at which the transaction is finalized.

BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.name: BLOCK_TIMESTAMP
BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.comment: The block timestamp of this transaction in UTC

TX_HASH.name: TX_HASH
TX_HASH.comment: Transaction hash is a unique 66-character identifier that is generated when a transaction is executed.

CONTRACT_ADDRESS.name: CONTRACT_ADDRESS
CONTRACT_ADDRESS.comment: The address interacted with for a given event.

PROTOCOL_MARKET.name: PROTOCOL_MARKET
PROTOCOL_MARKET.comment: The protocol's specific lending asset token, ie cWBTC or aETHUni.

DEPOSITOR.name: DEPOSITOR
DEPOSITOR.comment: Its the address of the user who is Borrowing or repaying the loan, depending on the action.

TOKEN_ADDRESS.name: TOKEN_ADDRESS
TOKEN_ADDRESS.comment: The address of the token associated with the lending action.

TOKEN_SYMBOL.name: TOKEN_SYMBOL
TOKEN_SYMBOL.comment: The symbol of the token associated with the lending action.

AMOUNT.name: AMOUNT
AMOUNT.comment: The decimal adjusted amount of tokens involved in the lending transaction, where available.

AMOUNT_USD.name: AMOUNT_USD
AMOUNT_USD.comment: The value of the tokens in USD at the time of the lending transaction, where available.

EZ_LENDING_WITHDRAWS_ID.name: EZ_LENDING_WITHDRAWS_ID
EZ_LENDING_WITHDRAWS_ID.comment: The unique identifier for each row in the table.

INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.name: INSERTED_TIMESTAMP
INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The utc timestamp at which the row was inserted into the table.

MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.name: MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP
MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The utc timestamp at which the row was last modified.

metadata.name: DIM_PREDICTION_MARKETS
metadata.comment: This table contains all markets and tokens available via various prediction market APIs, providing a comprehensive view of market and token data.

QUESTION.name: QUESTION
QUESTION.comment: The actual question the market is based on, which defines the event participants are betting on.

DESCRIPTION.name: DESCRIPTION
DESCRIPTION.comment: A detailed description of the market, providing context and additional information about the question.

CONDITION_ID.name: CONDITION_ID
CONDITION_ID.comment: ID of the specific market, linking it to the event or question it is based on.

QUESTION_ID.name: QUESTION_ID
QUESTION_ID.comment: ID of the question associated with the market, used to link market data with the underlying event or scenario.

TOKEN_0_OUTCOME.name: TOKEN_0_OUTCOME
TOKEN_0_OUTCOME.comment: Outcome associated with the first token, typically indicating 'yes' or 'no.'

TOKEN_0_WINNER.name: TOKEN_0_WINNER
TOKEN_0_WINNER.comment: Indicates the winner status of the first token, showing if it was the successful outcome.

TOKEN_1_OUTCOME.name: TOKEN_1_OUTCOME
TOKEN_1_OUTCOME.comment: Outcome associated with the second token, typically indicating 'yes' or 'no.'

TOKEN_1_WINNER.name: TOKEN_1_WINNER
TOKEN_1_WINNER.comment: Indicates the winner status of the second token, showing if it was the successful outcome.

ACTIVE.name: ACTIVE
ACTIVE.comment: Indicates if the market is currently live and accepting participation.

CLOSED.name: CLOSED
CLOSED.comment: Indicates if the market is not currently live or has concluded.

MINIMUM_ORDER_SIZE.name: MINIMUM_ORDER_SIZE
MINIMUM_ORDER_SIZE.comment: Minimum size of an order in the market, determining the smallest amount participants can trade.

MINIMUM_TICK_SIZE.name: MINIMUM_TICK_SIZE
MINIMUM_TICK_SIZE.comment: Minimum tick size for the market, indicating the smallest price increment for orders.

END_DATE.name: END_DATE
END_DATE.comment: End date of the market in ISO 8601 format, indicating when the market will resolve.

START_TIME.name: START_TIME
START_TIME.comment: Start time of the event associated with the market, used for timing-related aspects of trading.

MAKER_BASE_FEE.name: MAKER_BASE_FEE
MAKER_BASE_FEE.comment: Base fee charged to makers in the market for providing liquidity.

TAKER_BASE_FEE.name: TAKER_BASE_FEE
TAKER_BASE_FEE.comment: Base fee charged to takers in the market for executing trades against maker orders.

NEG_RISK.name: NEG_RISK
NEG_RISK.comment: Indicates if negative risk is present in the market, highlighting specific risk conditions.

INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.name: INSERTED_TIMESTAMP
INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The timestamp when the record was inserted.

MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.name: MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP
MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The timestamp when the record was last modified.

metadata.name: EZ_CORE_METRICS_HOURLY
metadata.comment: A convenience table that aggregates block and transaction related metrics using various aggregate functions such as SUM, COUNT, MIN and MAX from the fact_transactions table, on an hourly basis. Stats for the current hour will be updated as new data arrives.

BLOCK_TIMESTAMP_HOUR.name: BLOCK_TIMESTAMP_HOUR
BLOCK_TIMESTAMP_HOUR.comment: The hour of the timestamp of the block.

BLOCK_NUMBER_MIN.name: BLOCK_NUMBER_MIN
BLOCK_NUMBER_MIN.comment: The minimum block number in the hour.

BLOCK_NUMBER_MAX.name: BLOCK_NUMBER_MAX
BLOCK_NUMBER_MAX.comment: The maximum block number in the hour.

BLOCK_COUNT.name: BLOCK_COUNT
BLOCK_COUNT.comment: The number of blocks in the hour.

TRANSACTION_COUNT.name: TRANSACTION_COUNT
TRANSACTION_COUNT.comment: The number of transactions in the hour.

TRANSACTION_COUNT_SUCCESS.name: TRANSACTION_COUNT_SUCCESS
TRANSACTION_COUNT_SUCCESS.comment: The number of successful transactions in the hour.

TRANSACTION_COUNT_FAILED.name: TRANSACTION_COUNT_FAILED
TRANSACTION_COUNT_FAILED.comment: The number of failed transactions in the hour.

UNIQUE_INITIATOR_COUNT.name: UNIQUE_INITIATOR_COUNT
UNIQUE_INITIATOR_COUNT.comment: The number of unique initiator or origin from addresses in the hour.

TOTAL_FEES_USD.name: TOTAL_FEES_USD
TOTAL_FEES_USD.comment: The sum of all fees in the hour, in USD.

EZ_CORE_METRICS_HOURLY_ID.name: EZ_CORE_METRICS_HOURLY_ID
EZ_CORE_METRICS_HOURLY_ID.comment: The unique identifier for each row in the table.

metadata.name: EZ_UNIT_REGISTRATIONS
metadata.comment: This convenience table contains fact-based records of unit registrations (Agents and Components) within the OLAS protocol, capturing essential information about each registered unit event and includes a join on the `dim_registry_metadata` table for additional details pertaining to each unit_id, such as name and description.

BLOCKCHAIN.name: BLOCKCHAIN
BLOCKCHAIN.comment: Blockchain, Network, or Platform the transaction or event occurs on.

BLOCK_NUMBER.name: BLOCK_NUMBER
BLOCK_NUMBER.comment: The block number at which the transaction is finalized.

BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.name: BLOCK_TIMESTAMP
BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.comment: The block timestamp of this transaction in UTC

TX_HASH.name: TX_HASH
TX_HASH.comment: Transaction hash is a unique 66-character identifier that is generated when a transaction is executed.

ORIGIN_FUNCTION_SIGNATURE.name: ORIGIN_FUNCTION_SIGNATURE
ORIGIN_FUNCTION_SIGNATURE.comment: The function signature of this transaction.

ORIGIN_FROM_ADDRESS.name: ORIGIN_FROM_ADDRESS
ORIGIN_FROM_ADDRESS.comment: The address that initiates the transaction. If a transaction generates multiple events, all of them will have the same origin_from_address.

ORIGIN_TO_ADDRESS.name: ORIGIN_TO_ADDRESS
ORIGIN_TO_ADDRESS.comment: The address that receives the transaction. If a transaction generates multiple events, all of them will have the same origin_to_address.

CONTRACT_ADDRESS.name: CONTRACT_ADDRESS
CONTRACT_ADDRESS.comment: The address of the contract interacted with.

EVENT_NAME.name: EVENT_NAME
EVENT_NAME.comment: The name of the event.

UNIT_ID.name: UNIT_ID
UNIT_ID.comment: The unique identifier of the registered Unit.

U_TYPE.name: U_TYPE
U_TYPE.comment: The type of unit, in fixed number format.

UNIT_TYPE.name: UNIT_TYPE
UNIT_TYPE.comment: The type of unit, in human-readable format.

NAME.name: NAME
NAME.comment: The registered name of the Unit (Agent, Component) or Service.

DESCRIPTION.name: DESCRIPTION
DESCRIPTION.comment: The registered description of the Unit (Agent, Component) or Service.

SUBCOMPONENT_IDS.name: SUBCOMPONENT_IDS
SUBCOMPONENT_IDS.comment: The unique identifier of the sub-components that make up the Agent or Component.

TRAIT_TYPE.name: TRAIT_TYPE
TRAIT_TYPE.comment: The trait type for the registered Unit (Agent, Component) or Service.

TRAIT_VALUE.name: TRAIT_VALUE
TRAIT_VALUE.comment: The trait value for the registered Unit (Agent, Component) or Service.

IMAGE_LINK.name: IMAGE_LINK
IMAGE_LINK.comment: The link to the image of the registered Unit (Agent, Component) or Service.

UNIT_METADATA_LINK.name: UNIT_METADATA_LINK
UNIT_METADATA_LINK.comment: The link to the metadata for the registered Unit (Agent, Component).

EZ_UNIT_REGISTRATIONS_ID.name: EZ_UNIT_REGISTRATIONS_ID
EZ_UNIT_REGISTRATIONS_ID.comment: The unique identifier for each row in the table.

INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.name: INSERTED_TIMESTAMP
INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The utc timestamp at which the row was inserted into the table.

MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.name: MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP
MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The utc timestamp at which the row was last modified.

metadata.name: EZ_LENDING_BORROWS
metadata.comment: A comprehensive table that contains all blockchain and platform specific borrows. This table contains borrows from Arbitrum, Avalanche, Base, BSC, Gnosis, Ethereum, Optimism, and Polygon. In order to borrow assets, a user must first deposit their preferred asset and amount as collateral.

PLATFORM.name: PLATFORM
PLATFORM.comment: The specific protocol where lending event occurred.

BLOCK_NUMBER.name: BLOCK_NUMBER
BLOCK_NUMBER.comment: The block number at which the transaction is finalized.

BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.name: BLOCK_TIMESTAMP
BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.comment: The block timestamp of this transaction in UTC

TX_HASH.name: TX_HASH
TX_HASH.comment: Transaction hash is a unique 66-character identifier that is generated when a transaction is executed.

CONTRACT_ADDRESS.name: CONTRACT_ADDRESS
CONTRACT_ADDRESS.comment: The address interacted with for a given event.

PROTOCOL_MARKET.name: PROTOCOL_MARKET
PROTOCOL_MARKET.comment: The protocol's specific lending asset token, ie cWBTC or aETHUni.

BORROWER.name: BORROWER
BORROWER.comment: Address that initiated the borrow event.

TOKEN_ADDRESS.name: TOKEN_ADDRESS
TOKEN_ADDRESS.comment: The address of the token associated with the lending action.

TOKEN_SYMBOL.name: TOKEN_SYMBOL
TOKEN_SYMBOL.comment: The symbol of the token associated with the lending action.

AMOUNT.name: AMOUNT
AMOUNT.comment: The decimal adjusted amount of tokens involved in the lending transaction, where available.

AMOUNT_USD.name: AMOUNT_USD
AMOUNT_USD.comment: The value of the tokens in USD at the time of the lending transaction, where available.

EZ_LENDING_BORROWS_ID.name: EZ_LENDING_BORROWS_ID
EZ_LENDING_BORROWS_ID.comment: The unique identifier for each row in the table.

INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.name: INSERTED_TIMESTAMP
INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The utc timestamp at which the row was inserted into the table.

MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.name: MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP
MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The utc timestamp at which the row was last modified.

metadata.name: FACT_TRANSACTIONS
metadata.comment: Records of transactions that have occurred on Axelar, Cosmos, and Osmosis.

BLOCKCHAIN.name: BLOCKCHAIN
BLOCKCHAIN.comment: The name of the blockchain

BLOCK_ID.name: BLOCK_ID
BLOCK_ID.comment: The block height the block was recorded at.

BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.name: BLOCK_TIMESTAMP
BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.comment: The date and time at which the block began.

TX_ID.name: TX_ID
TX_ID.comment: A unique key that identifies a transaction. Called "TxHash" on block explorers.

TX_FROM.name: TX_FROM
TX_FROM.comment: The wallet address of the individual who initiated the transaction

FEE.name: FEE
FEE.comment: The fee is paid by the initiator of the transaction. Fee = gas * gas price.

FEE_DENOM.name: FEE_DENOM
FEE_DENOM.comment: The denominator of the transaction fee.

GAS_USED.name: GAS_USED
GAS_USED.comment: The amount of gas consumed by the transaction.

GAS_WANTED.name: GAS_WANTED
GAS_WANTED.comment: Amount of gas requested for a transaction. It is provided by users when the transaction is generated.

TX_CODE.name: TX_CODE
TX_CODE.comment: A number that corresponds to various error codes. When "0", the transaction is successful. Non-zero numbers signify different types of transaction failures.

TX_LOG.name: TX_LOG
TX_LOG.comment: A string that contains the transaction logs, which are logs written by the program interacted with during the transaction.

MSGS.name: MSGS
MSGS.comment: The underlying json from the messages or events within the transactions

TX_SUCCEEDED.name: TX_SUCCEEDED
TX_SUCCEEDED.comment: Transaction status is "TRUE" if the transaction was successful, "FALSE" if the transaction failed.

INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.name: INSERTED_TIMESTAMP
INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The utc timestamp at which the row was inserted into the table.

MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.name: MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP
MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The utc timestamp at which the row was last modified.

FACT_TRANSACTIONS_ID.name: FACT_TRANSACTIONS_ID
FACT_TRANSACTIONS_ID.comment: The unique identifier for each row in the table.

metadata.name: DIM_LABELS
metadata.comment: The labels table is a store of one-to-one address identifiers, or an address name. Labels are broken out into a "type" (such as cex, dex, dapp, games, etc.) and a "subtype" (ex: contract_deployer, hot_wallet, token_contract, etc.) in order to help classify each address name into similar groups. Our labels are sourced from many different places, but can primarily be grouped into two categories: automatic and manual. Automatic labels are continuously labeled based on certain criteria, such as a known contract deploying another contract, behavior based algorithms for finding deposit wallets, and consistent data pulls of custom protocol APIs. Manual labels are done periodically to find addresses that cannot be found programatically such as finding new protocol addresses, centralized exchange hot wallets, or trending addresses. Labels can also be added by our community by using our add-a-label tool (https://science.flipsidecrypto.xyz/add-a-label/) or on-chain with near (https://near.social/lord1.near/widget/Form) and are reviewed by our labels team. A label can be removed by our labels team if it is found to be incorrect or no longer relevant; this generally will only happen for mislabeled deposit wallets.

INSERT_DATE.name: INSERT_DATE
INSERT_DATE.comment: The date the label was inserted in the table

BLOCKCHAIN.name: BLOCKCHAIN
BLOCKCHAIN.comment: The name of the blockchain

ADDRESS.name: ADDRESS
ADDRESS.comment: Address that the label is for. This is the field that should be used to join other tables with labels.

CREATOR.name: CREATOR
CREATOR.comment: The name of the creator of the label

LABEL_TYPE.name: LABEL_TYPE
LABEL_TYPE.comment: A high-level category describing the addresses main function or ownership

LABEL_SUBTYPE.name: LABEL_SUBTYPE
LABEL_SUBTYPE.comment: A sub-category nested within label type providing further detail

PROJECT_NAME.name: PROJECT_NAME
PROJECT_NAME.comment: Name of the controlling entity of the address

INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.name: INSERTED_TIMESTAMP
INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The utc timestamp at which the row was inserted into the table.

MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.name: MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP
MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The utc timestamp at which the row was last modified.

DIM_LABELS_ID.name: DIM_LABELS_ID
DIM_LABELS_ID.comment: The unique identifier for each row in the table.

BLOCKCHAIN.comment: The name of the blockchain

SYMBOL.name: SYMBOL
SYMBOL.comment: Symbol for ntr analysis

ADDRESS.name: ADDRESS
ADDRESS.comment: Address on the blockchain

REWARD.name: REWARD
REWARD.comment: total paid through bounty program to the address from beginning of the data through the current date

HODL.name: HODL
HODL.comment: amount (of reward) that is still held in the original address paid

STAKE.name: STAKE
STAKE.comment: amount of the reward that was staked

CEX_DEPOSIT.name: CEX_DEPOSIT
CEX_DEPOSIT.comment: amount of the reward that was deposited to a centralized exchange

NFT_BUY.name: NFT_BUY
NFT_BUY.comment: amount of the reward that was used to purchase an NFT

DEX_SWAP.name: DEX_SWAP
DEX_SWAP.comment: amount of the reward that was swapped for another token on a decentralized exchange

BRIDGE.name: BRIDGE
BRIDGE.comment: amount of the reward that was deposited to a centralized exchange

FIRST_IS_BOUNTY.name: FIRST_IS_BOUNTY
FIRST_IS_BOUNTY.comment: indicates if the addresses' first receipt of the token was through a Flipside program

DID_HUNT.name: DID_HUNT
DID_HUNT.comment: indicates if the address participated in a scavenger hunt for this token

DID_NEW_USER.name: DID_NEW_USER
DID_NEW_USER.comment: indicates if the address participated in a new user bounty for this token

DID_BOUNTY.name: DID_BOUNTY
DID_BOUNTY.comment: indicates if the address participated in a bounty for this token (excluding new user bounties)

metadata.name: EZ_PREDICTION_MARKET_ORDERS
metadata.comment: This table contains filled orders from prediction markets, incorporating market and token metadata available via various APIs, allowing for a comprehensive view of prediction market transactions.

BLOCKCHAIN.name: BLOCKCHAIN
BLOCKCHAIN.comment: Blockchain, Network, or Platform the transaction or event occurs on.

PLATFORM.name: PLATFORM
PLATFORM.comment: The platform on which the prediction market operates.

BLOCK_NUMBER.name: BLOCK_NUMBER
BLOCK_NUMBER.comment: The block number at which the transaction is finalized.

BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.name: BLOCK_TIMESTAMP
BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.comment: The block timestamp of this transaction in UTC

TX_HASH.name: TX_HASH
TX_HASH.comment: Transaction hash is a unique 66-character identifier that is generated when a transaction is executed.

QUESTION.name: QUESTION
QUESTION.comment: The human-readable question that defines the market. This question outlines the specific event or scenario that the market is based on, and participants bet on the outcome.

OUTCOME.name: OUTCOME
OUTCOME.comment: The specific result direction for a token within the market, typically indicating either 'yes' or 'no.' This represents the outcome of the market question.

MAKER.name: MAKER
MAKER.comment: The address or identifier of the maker in the transaction, who provides liquidity or initiates an order within the market, setting the initial terms for others to take.

TAKER.name: TAKER
TAKER.comment: The address or identifier of the taker in the transaction, who accepts the order created by the maker and completes the trade under the terms specified.

AMOUNT_USD.name: AMOUNT_USD
AMOUNT_USD.comment: The total value of the bet placed, expressed in USD.

SHARES.name: SHARES
SHARES.comment: The number of shares purchased in the order.

PRICE_PER_SHARE.name: PRICE_PER_SHARE
PRICE_PER_SHARE.comment: The cost per individual share in the transaction, which also serves as a proxy for the current market percentage chance of the outcome associated with this question.

END_DATE.name: END_DATE
END_DATE.comment: The date and time when the market will resolve, formatted in ISO 8601 (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ). This marks the point at which the outcome is determined based on the question.

ORDER_HASH.name: ORDER_HASH
ORDER_HASH.comment: A unique cryptographic hash that identifies the order within the prediction market system. It serves as a unique reference for transactions related to buying or selling shares in the market.

ASSET_ID.name: ASSET_ID
ASSET_ID.comment: The unique identifier of the asset addressing the question outcome, used to join with off-chain API data.

CONDITION_ID.name: CONDITION_ID
CONDITION_ID.comment: The unique identifier for the market's specific condition, linking it to a particular event or question. This ID is used to manage and resolve market outcomes.

QUESTION_ID.name: QUESTION_ID
QUESTION_ID.comment: The unique identifier for the question in the prediction market.

INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.name: INSERTED_TIMESTAMP
INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The timestamp when the record was inserted.

MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.name: MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP
MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The timestamp when the record was last modified.

EZ_PREDICTION_MARKET_ORDERS_ID.name: EZ_PREDICTION_MARKET_ORDERS_ID
EZ_PREDICTION_MARKET_ORDERS_ID.comment: The unique identifier for the prediction market order.

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: DIM_ASSET_METADATA
metadata.comment: A comprehensive dimensional table holding asset metadata and other relevant details pertaining to each id, from multiple providers. This data set includes raw, non-transformed data coming directly from the provider APIs and rows are not intended to be unique. As a result, there may be data quality issues persisting in the APIs that flow through to this dimensional model. If you are interested in using a curated data set instead, please utilize ez_asset_metadata.

TOKEN_ADDRESS.name: TOKEN_ADDRESS
TOKEN_ADDRESS.comment: The specific address representing the asset on a specific platform. This will be NULL if referring to a native asset.

ASSET_ID.name: ASSET_ID
ASSET_ID.comment: The unique identifier representing the asset.

SYMBOL.name: SYMBOL
SYMBOL.comment: The symbol of asset.

NAME.name: NAME
NAME.comment: The name of asset.

BLOCKCHAIN.name: BLOCKCHAIN
BLOCKCHAIN.comment: The Blockchain, Network, or Platform for this asset.

BLOCKCHAIN_ID.name: BLOCKCHAIN_ID
BLOCKCHAIN_ID.comment: The unique identifier of the Blockchain, Network, or Platform for this asset.

PROVIDER.name: PROVIDER
PROVIDER.comment: The provider or source of the data.

INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.name: INSERTED_TIMESTAMP
INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The utc timestamp at which the row was inserted into the table.

MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.name: MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP
MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The utc timestamp at which the row was last modified.

DIM_ASSET_METADATA_ID.name: DIM_ASSET_METADATA_ID
DIM_ASSET_METADATA_ID.comment: The unique identifier for each row in the table.

metadata.name: EZ_SERVICE_STAKING
metadata.comment: This fact-based convenience table contains Service staking events, including epoch, owner and multisig addresses, the relevant staking program, and an additional join on the `dim_registry_metadata` table for details pertaining to each service_id, such as name and description.

BLOCKCHAIN.name: BLOCKCHAIN
BLOCKCHAIN.comment: Blockchain, Network, or Platform the transaction or event occurs on.

BLOCK_NUMBER.name: BLOCK_NUMBER
BLOCK_NUMBER.comment: The block number at which the transaction is finalized.

BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.name: BLOCK_TIMESTAMP
BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.comment: The block timestamp of this transaction in UTC

TX_HASH.name: TX_HASH
TX_HASH.comment: Transaction hash is a unique 66-character identifier that is generated when a transaction is executed.

ORIGIN_FUNCTION_SIGNATURE.name: ORIGIN_FUNCTION_SIGNATURE
ORIGIN_FUNCTION_SIGNATURE.comment: The function signature of this transaction.

ORIGIN_FROM_ADDRESS.name: ORIGIN_FROM_ADDRESS
ORIGIN_FROM_ADDRESS.comment: The address that initiates the transaction. If a transaction generates multiple events, all of them will have the same origin_from_address.

ORIGIN_TO_ADDRESS.name: ORIGIN_TO_ADDRESS
ORIGIN_TO_ADDRESS.comment: The address that receives the transaction. If a transaction generates multiple events, all of them will have the same origin_to_address.

CONTRACT_ADDRESS.name: CONTRACT_ADDRESS
CONTRACT_ADDRESS.comment: The address of the contract interacted with.

EVENT_NAME.name: EVENT_NAME
EVENT_NAME.comment: The name of the event.

MULTISIG_ADDRESS.name: MULTISIG_ADDRESS
MULTISIG_ADDRESS.comment: The address of the multi-signature wallet, typically a GnosisSafe.

SERVICE_ID.name: SERVICE_ID
SERVICE_ID.comment: The unique identifier of the registered Service.

NAME.name: NAME
NAME.comment: The registered name of the Unit (Agent, Component) or Service.

DESCRIPTION.name: DESCRIPTION
DESCRIPTION.comment: The registered description of the Unit (Agent, Component) or Service.

EPOCH.name: EPOCH
EPOCH.comment: The period or unit of time.

REWARD_UNADJ.name: REWARD_UNADJ
REWARD_UNADJ.comment: The value of the reward, non-decimal adjusted.

REWARD.name: REWARD
REWARD.comment: The value of the reward, decimal adjusted.

TOTAL_AVAILABLE_REWARDS_UNADJ.name: TOTAL_AVAILABLE_REWARDS_UNADJ
TOTAL_AVAILABLE_REWARDS_UNADJ.comment: The total rewards available in the event, non-decimal adjusted.

TOTAL_AVAILABLE_REWARDS.name: TOTAL_AVAILABLE_REWARDS
TOTAL_AVAILABLE_REWARDS.comment: The total rewards available in the event, decimal adjusted.

PROGRAM_NAME.name: PROGRAM_NAME
PROGRAM_NAME.comment: The name of the staking program.

EZ_SERVICE_STAKING_ID.name: EZ_SERVICE_STAKING_ID
EZ_SERVICE_STAKING_ID.comment: The unique identifier for each row in the table.

INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.name: INSERTED_TIMESTAMP
INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The utc timestamp at which the row was inserted into the table.

MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.name: MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP
MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The utc timestamp at which the row was last modified.

metadata.name: EZ_DEX_SWAPS
metadata.comment: A comprehensive convenience table holding blockchain and platform specific decentralized exchange swaps. This table contains dex swaps from Arbitrum, Avalanche, Base, BSC, Gnosis, Ethereum, Optimism, Polygon, Osmosis, Solana, and Near.

BLOCKCHAIN.name: BLOCKCHAIN
BLOCKCHAIN.comment: Blockchain, Network, or Platform the token price is recorded on.

PLATFORM.name: PLATFORM
PLATFORM.comment: The name of the dex or swap platform

BLOCK_NUMBER.name: BLOCK_NUMBER
BLOCK_NUMBER.comment: Also known as block height. The block number, which indicates the length of the blockchain, increases after the addition of each new block.

BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.name: BLOCK_TIMESTAMP
BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.comment: The date and time at which the block was produced.

TX_HASH.name: TX_HASH
TX_HASH.comment: Transaction hash is a unique identifier that is generated when a transaction is executed.

CONTRACT_ADDRESS.name: CONTRACT_ADDRESS
CONTRACT_ADDRESS.comment: The contract address interacted with for the swap, typically the liquidity pool or router address, where applicable. Value may be NULL for certain chains, such as Osmosis and Near, where records occur at a different granularity such as one row per transaction rather than one row per event.

TRADER.name: TRADER
TRADER.comment: The address that initiated the swap.

TOKEN_IN.name: TOKEN_IN
TOKEN_IN.comment: The address of the token sent for swap.

SYMBOL_IN.name: SYMBOL_IN
SYMBOL_IN.comment: The symbol of the token sent for swap.

AMOUNT_IN_RAW.name: AMOUNT_IN_RAW
AMOUNT_IN_RAW.comment: The unadjusted amount of tokens put into the swap.

AMOUNT_IN.name: AMOUNT_IN
AMOUNT_IN.comment: The decimal adjusted amount of tokens put into the swap.

AMOUNT_IN_USD.name: AMOUNT_IN_USD
AMOUNT_IN_USD.comment: The amount of tokens put into the swap converted to USD using the price of the token.

TOKEN_OUT.name: TOKEN_OUT
TOKEN_OUT.comment: The address of the token being swapped to.

SYMBOL_OUT.name: SYMBOL_OUT
SYMBOL_OUT.comment: The symbol of the token being swapped to.

AMOUNT_OUT_RAW.name: AMOUNT_OUT_RAW
AMOUNT_OUT_RAW.comment: The unadjusted amount of tokens taken out of or received from the swap.

AMOUNT_OUT.name: AMOUNT_OUT
AMOUNT_OUT.comment: The decimal adjusted amount of tokens taken out of or received from the swap.

AMOUNT_OUT_USD.name: AMOUNT_OUT_USD
AMOUNT_OUT_USD.comment: The amount of tokens taken out of or received from the swap converted to USD using the price of the token.

INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.name: INSERTED_TIMESTAMP
INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The utc timestamp at which the row was inserted into the table.

MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.name: MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP
MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The utc timestamp at which the row was last modified.

EZ_DEX_SWAPS_ID.name: EZ_DEX_SWAPS_ID
EZ_DEX_SWAPS_ID.comment: The unique identifier for each row in the table.

metadata.name: EZ_PRICES_HOURLY
metadata.comment: A convenience table for determining token prices by address and blockchain, and native asset prices by symbol and blockchain. This data set is highly curated and contains metadata for one price per hour per unique asset and blockchain.

HOUR.name: HOUR
HOUR.comment: Hour that the price was recorded at.

TOKEN_ADDRESS.name: TOKEN_ADDRESS
TOKEN_ADDRESS.comment: The specific address representing the asset on a specific platform. This will be NULL if referring to a native asset.

SYMBOL.name: SYMBOL
SYMBOL.comment: The symbol of asset.

DECIMALS.name: DECIMALS
DECIMALS.comment: The number of decimals for the asset. May be NULL.

PRICE.name: PRICE
PRICE.comment: Closing price of the recorded hour in USD.

BLOCKCHAIN.name: BLOCKCHAIN
BLOCKCHAIN.comment: The Blockchain, Network, or Platform for this asset.

IS_NATIVE.name: IS_NATIVE
IS_NATIVE.comment: A flag indicating assets native to the respective blockchain.

IS_IMPUTED.name: IS_IMPUTED
IS_IMPUTED.comment: A flag indicating if the price was imputed, or derived, from the last arriving record. This is generally used for tokens with low-liquidity or inconsistent reporting.

IS_DEPRECATED.name: IS_DEPRECATED
IS_DEPRECATED.comment: A flag indicating if the asset is deprecated or no longer supported by the provider.

INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.name: INSERTED_TIMESTAMP
INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The utc timestamp at which the row was inserted into the table.

MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.name: MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP

EZ_PRICES_HOURLY_ID.comment: The unique identifier for each row in the table.

metadata.name: EZ_MECH_ACTIVITY
metadata.comment: This convenience table consolidates mech request and delivery activities within the OLAS protocol, combining request and delivery data (`prompt` and `deliver` links) into a unified set of records, emulating the format of the [AIMechs app](https://aimechs.autonolas.network/mech).

BLOCKCHAIN.name: BLOCKCHAIN
BLOCKCHAIN.comment: Blockchain, Network, or Platform the transaction or event occurs on.

REQUEST_ID.name: REQUEST_ID
REQUEST_ID.comment: The unique identifier of the request.

PROMPT_LINK.name: PROMPT_LINK
PROMPT_LINK.comment: The metadata link to the prompt.

DELIVERY_LINK.name: DELIVERY_LINK
DELIVERY_LINK.comment: The metadata link to the prompt response / delivery data.

EZ_MECH_ACTIVITY_ID.name: EZ_MECH_ACTIVITY_ID
EZ_MECH_ACTIVITY_ID.comment: The unique identifier for each row in the table.

INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.name: INSERTED_TIMESTAMP

metadata.name: FACT_BRIDGE_ACTIVITY
metadata.comment: A comprehensive fact table holding blockchain and platform specific bridge activity from event_logs, traces and transfers, including bridge deposits/withdrawals and transfers in/out on the following blockchains: Arbitrum, Avalanche, Base, Blast, BSC, Gnosis, Ethereum, Optimism, Polygon, Solana, Aptos, Near, Flow and more.

BLOCKCHAIN.name: BLOCKCHAIN
BLOCKCHAIN.comment: Blockchain, Network, or Platform the token bridge activity is recorded on.

PLATFORM.name: PLATFORM
PLATFORM.comment: The platform or protocol from which the bridge transaction or event originates.

BLOCK_NUMBER.name: BLOCK_NUMBER
BLOCK_NUMBER.comment: Also known as block height. The block number, which indicates the length of the blockchain, increases after the addition of each new block.

BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.name: BLOCK_TIMESTAMP
BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.comment: The date and time at which the block was produced.

TX_HASH.name: TX_HASH
TX_HASH.comment: Transaction hash is a unique identifier that is generated when a transaction is executed.

SOURCE_CHAIN.name: SOURCE_CHAIN
SOURCE_CHAIN.comment: The name of the blockchain network to which the assets are being bridged from.

DESTINATION_CHAIN.name: DESTINATION_CHAIN
DESTINATION_CHAIN.comment: The name of the blockchain network to which the assets are being bridged to.

BRIDGE_ADDRESS.name: BRIDGE_ADDRESS
BRIDGE_ADDRESS.comment: The address of the contract responsible for handling the bridge deposit or transfer. This contract mediates the transfer and ensures that assets are sent and received appropriately.

SOURCE_ADDRESS.name: SOURCE_ADDRESS
SOURCE_ADDRESS.comment: The address that initiated the bridge deposit or transfer. This address is the sender of the tokens/assets being bridged to the destination chain. This may be an EOA or contract address.

DESTINATION_ADDRESS.name: DESTINATION_ADDRESS
DESTINATION_ADDRESS.comment: The designated address set to receive the bridged tokens on the target chain after the completion of the bridge transaction. For non-evm chains, the hex address is decoded/encoded to match the data format of the destination chain, where possible. This may be an EOA or contract address.

DIRECTION.name: DIRECTION
DIRECTION.comment: Indicates the direction in which the assets are being bridged, out/outbound or in/inbound.

TOKEN_ADDRESS.name: TOKEN_ADDRESS
TOKEN_ADDRESS.comment: The address associated with the token that is being bridged. It provides a unique identifier for the token within its origin blockchain.

AMOUNT_RAW.name: AMOUNT_RAW
AMOUNT_RAW.comment: The raw, non-decimal adjusted amount of tokens involved in the bridge transaction. For Solana, these are decimal adjusted amounts.

INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.name: INSERTED_TIMESTAMP
INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The utc timestamp at which the row was inserted into the table.

MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.name: MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP
MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The utc timestamp at which the row was last modified.

FACT_BRIDGE_ACTIVITY_ID.name: FACT_BRIDGE_ACTIVITY_ID
FACT_BRIDGE_ACTIVITY_ID.comment: The unique identifier for each row in the table.

metadata.name: EZ_OLAS_LOCKING
metadata.comment: This convenience table captures the locking of OLAS tokens for Voting Escrow OLAS (veOLAS), including information on the amount locked and the duration of the lock-up periods.

BLOCKCHAIN.name: BLOCKCHAIN
BLOCKCHAIN.comment: Blockchain, Network, or Platform the transaction or event occurs on.

BLOCK_NUMBER.name: BLOCK_NUMBER
BLOCK_NUMBER.comment: The block number at which the transaction is finalized.

BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.name: BLOCK_TIMESTAMP
BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.comment: The block timestamp of this transaction in UTC

TX_HASH.name: TX_HASH
TX_HASH.comment: Transaction hash is a unique 66-character identifier that is generated when a transaction is executed.

ORIGIN_FUNCTION_SIGNATURE.name: ORIGIN_FUNCTION_SIGNATURE
ORIGIN_FUNCTION_SIGNATURE.comment: The function signature of this transaction.

ORIGIN_FROM_ADDRESS.name: ORIGIN_FROM_ADDRESS
ORIGIN_FROM_ADDRESS.comment: The address that initiates the transaction. If a transaction generates multiple events, all of them will have the same origin_from_address.

ORIGIN_TO_ADDRESS.name: ORIGIN_TO_ADDRESS
ORIGIN_TO_ADDRESS.comment: The address that receives the transaction. If a transaction generates multiple events, all of them will have the same origin_to_address.

CONTRACT_ADDRESS.name: CONTRACT_ADDRESS
CONTRACT_ADDRESS.comment: The address of the contract interacted with.

EVENT_NAME.name: EVENT_NAME
EVENT_NAME.comment: The name of the event.

OLAS_AMOUNT_UNADJ.name: OLAS_AMOUNT_UNADJ
OLAS_AMOUNT_UNADJ.comment: The value of the asset, non-decimal adjusted.

OLAS_AMOUNT.name: OLAS_AMOUNT
OLAS_AMOUNT.comment: The value of the asset, decimal adjusted.

OLAS_AMOUNT_USD.name: OLAS_AMOUNT_USD
OLAS_AMOUNT_USD.comment: The value of the asset, denominated in USD where available.

UNLOCK_TIMESTAMP.name: UNLOCK_TIMESTAMP
UNLOCK_TIMESTAMP.comment: The date and time that the asset unlocks for redemption.

EZ_OLAS_LOCKING_ID.name: EZ_OLAS_LOCKING_ID
EZ_OLAS_LOCKING_ID.comment: The unique identifier for each row in the table.

INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.name: INSERTED_TIMESTAMP
INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The utc timestamp at which the row was inserted into the table.

MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.name: MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP
MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The utc timestamp at which the row was last modified.

metadata.name: DIM_REGISTRY_METADATA
metadata.comment: This table contains dimensional metadata for the registry contracts, including details about the various Agent, Component and Service entities registered in the OLAS ecosystem. The metadata is sourced via contract reads on the tokenURI function, and typically direct to IPFS. Metadata columns may be null, as they are sourced from contract reads (on EVMs) and the calls will be retried where applicable. Various chain-specific columns may be null, as this table joins together the EVM and SVM.

BLOCKCHAIN.name: BLOCKCHAIN
BLOCKCHAIN.comment: Blockchain, Network, or Platform the transaction or event occurs on.

NAME.name: NAME
NAME.comment: The registered name of the Unit (Agent, Component) or Service.

DESCRIPTION.name: DESCRIPTION
DESCRIPTION.comment: The registered description of the Unit (Agent, Component) or Service.

REGISTRY_ID.name: REGISTRY_ID
REGISTRY_ID.comment: The unique identifier associated with the registered Unit (Agent, Component) or Service.

CONTRACT_ADDRESS.name: CONTRACT_ADDRESS
CONTRACT_ADDRESS.comment: The address of the contract interacted with.

REGISTRY_TYPE.name: REGISTRY_TYPE
REGISTRY_TYPE.comment: The type of registered Unit (Agent, Component) or Service.

TRAIT_TYPE.name: TRAIT_TYPE
TRAIT_TYPE.comment: The trait type for the registered Unit (Agent, Component) or Service.

TRAIT_VALUE.name: TRAIT_VALUE
TRAIT_VALUE.comment: The trait value for the registered Unit (Agent, Component) or Service.

CODE_URI_LINK.name: CODE_URI_LINK
CODE_URI_LINK.comment: The metadata link for the registered Unit (Agent, Component) or Service.

IMAGE_LINK.name: IMAGE_LINK
IMAGE_LINK.comment: The link to the image of the registered Unit (Agent, Component) or Service.

AGENT_IDS.name: AGENT_IDS
AGENT_IDS.comment: The unique identifier of the Agent, which is a fundamental component of a Service.

SUBCOMPONENT_IDS.name: SUBCOMPONENT_IDS
SUBCOMPONENT_IDS.comment: The unique identifier of the sub-components that make up the Agent or Component.

DIM_REGISTRY_METADATA_ID.name: DIM_REGISTRY_METADATA_ID
DIM_REGISTRY_METADATA_ID.comment: The unique identifier for each row in the table.

INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.name: INSERTED_TIMESTAMP
INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The utc timestamp at which the row was inserted into the table.

MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.name: MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP
MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The utc timestamp at which the row was last modified.

metadata.name: EZ_CORE_METRICS_HOURLY
metadata.comment: A convenience table that aggregates block and transaction related metrics using various aggregate functions such as SUM, COUNT, MIN and MAX from the fact_transactions table, on an hourly basis. Stats for the current hour will be updated as new data arrives.

BLOCK_TIMESTAMP_HOUR.name: BLOCK_TIMESTAMP_HOUR
BLOCK_TIMESTAMP_HOUR.comment: The hour of the timestamp of the block.

BLOCK_NUMBER_MIN.name: BLOCK_NUMBER_MIN
BLOCK_NUMBER_MIN.comment: The minimum block id in the hour.

BLOCK_NUMBER_MAX.name: BLOCK_NUMBER_MAX
BLOCK_NUMBER_MAX.comment: The maximum block id in the hour.

BLOCK_COUNT.name: BLOCK_COUNT
BLOCK_COUNT.comment: The number of blocks in the hour.

TRANSACTION_COUNT.name: TRANSACTION_COUNT
TRANSACTION_COUNT.comment: The number of transactions in the hour.

TRANSACTION_COUNT_SUCCESS.name: TRANSACTION_COUNT_SUCCESS
TRANSACTION_COUNT_SUCCESS.comment: The number of successful transactions in the hour.

TRANSACTION_COUNT_FAILED.name: TRANSACTION_COUNT_FAILED

metadata.name: EZ_TOKEN_TRANSFERS
metadata.comment: This convenience table contains emitted event logs for ERC-20 Token Transfers (e.g. `Transfer`: topic_0 = `0xddf252ad1be2c89b69c2b068fc378daa952ba7f163c4a11628f55a4df523b3ef`), including decimal adjusted values, USD values, and other helpful token metadata where available for each transfer event. The contract address is the token transferred, and the raw amount field is the amount of tokens transferred. Note, this table does not contain ERC-721 and ERC-1155 token transfers, instead please use `nft.ez_nft_transfers`. Additionally, this table does not contain transfers of the chain's native asset, instead please use `core.ez_native_transfers`.

BLOCK_NUMBER.name: BLOCK_NUMBER
BLOCK_NUMBER.comment: Also known as block height. The block number, which indicates the length of the blockchain, increases after the addition of each new block.

BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.name: BLOCK_TIMESTAMP
BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.comment: The date and time at which the block was produced.

TX_HASH.name: TX_HASH
TX_HASH.comment: Transaction hash is a unique 66-character identifier that is generated when a transaction is executed.

TX_POSITION.name: TX_POSITION
TX_POSITION.comment: The position of the transaction within the block.

FROM_ADDRESS.name: FROM_ADDRESS
FROM_ADDRESS.comment: The sending address of this transfer.

TO_ADDRESS.name: TO_ADDRESS
TO_ADDRESS.comment: The receiving address of this transfer. This can be a contract address.

CONTRACT_ADDRESS.name: CONTRACT_ADDRESS
CONTRACT_ADDRESS.comment: The address of the contract that the event log was emitted from.

TOKEN_STANDARD.name: TOKEN_STANDARD
TOKEN_STANDARD.comment: The type of token transferred in this event, for example `erc721`, `erc1155`, or `erc20`.

NAME.name: NAME
NAME.comment: The name of the deployed contract. Please note this is not necessarily unique.

SYMBOL.name: SYMBOL
SYMBOL.comment: The symbol used to represent this contract. Please note this is not necessarily unique.

DECIMALS.name: DECIMALS
DECIMALS.comment: The decimals for the token contract.

RAW_AMOUNT_PRECISE.name: RAW_AMOUNT_PRECISE
RAW_AMOUNT_PRECISE.comment: The amount of tokens transferred returned as a string to preserve precision. This value is not decimal adjusted.

RAW_AMOUNT.name: RAW_AMOUNT
RAW_AMOUNT.comment: The amount of tokens transferred. This value is not decimal adjusted.

AMOUNT_PRECISE.name: AMOUNT_PRECISE
AMOUNT_PRECISE.comment: The decimal transformed amount for this token returned as a string to preserve precision. Tokens without a decimal adjustment will be nulled out here.

AMOUNT.name: AMOUNT
AMOUNT.comment: The decimal transformed amount for this token. Tokens without a decimal adjustment will be nulled out here.

AMOUNT_USD.name: AMOUNT_USD
AMOUNT_USD.comment: The amount in US dollars for this transfer at the time of the transfer. Tokens without a decimal adjustment or price will be nulled out here.

ORIGIN_FUNCTION_SIGNATURE.name: ORIGIN_FUNCTION_SIGNATURE
ORIGIN_FUNCTION_SIGNATURE.comment: The function signature of the call that triggered this transaction.

ORIGIN_FROM_ADDRESS.name: ORIGIN_FROM_ADDRESS
ORIGIN_FROM_ADDRESS.comment: The from address at the transaction level.

ORIGIN_TO_ADDRESS.name: ORIGIN_TO_ADDRESS
ORIGIN_TO_ADDRESS.comment: The to address at the transaction level.

EZ_TOKEN_TRANSFERS_ID.name: EZ_TOKEN_TRANSFERS_ID
EZ_TOKEN_TRANSFERS_ID.comment: The unique identifier for each row in the table.

INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.name: INSERTED_TIMESTAMP
INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The UTC timestamp at which the row was inserted into the table.

MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.name: MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP
MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The UTC timestamp at which the row was last modified.

metadata.name: EZ_LENDING_DEPOSITS
metadata.comment: This table contains deposit transactions across ORBIT, JUICE AND INIT protocols. A user deposits their preferred asset and amount. After depositing, users earn passive income based on the market borrowing demand. Additionally, depositing allows users to borrow by using their deposited assets as a collateral. Any interest earned by depositing funds helps offset the interest rate accumulated by borrowing.

ORIGIN_TO_ADDRESS.comment: The to address of this transaction.

PLATFORM.comment: The specific protocol where lending event occurred.

PROTOCOL_MARKET.comment: The protocol's specific lending asset token, ie cWBTC or aETHUni.

metadata.name: FACT_EVENT_LOGS
metadata.comment: This table contains flattened event logs from transactions on this EVM blockchain. Transactions may have multiple events, which are denoted by the event index for a transaction hash. Therefore, this table is unique on the combination of transaction hash and event index. Please see `fact_decoded_event_logs` or `ez_decoded_event_logs` for the decoded event logs.

metadata.name: EZ_DEX_SWAPS
metadata.comment:
This table currently contains swap events from the ```fact_event_logs``` table for AMBIENT, BLADESWAP, BLASTERSWAP, FENIX, RING, SUSHI, and THRUSTER. along with other helpful columns including an amount USD where possible. Other dexes coming soon!
Note: A rule has been put in place to null out the amount_USD if that number is too divergent between amount_in_USD and amount_out_usd. This can happen for swaps of less liquid tokens during very high fluctuation of price.

metadata.name: EZ_TOKEN_TRANSFERS
metadata.comment: This convenience table contains emitted event logs for ERC-20 Token Transfers (e.g. `Transfer`: topic_0 = `0xddf252ad1be2c89b69c2b068fc378daa952ba7f163c4a11628f55a4df523b3ef`), including decimal adjusted values, USD values, and other helpful token metadata where available for each transfer event. The contract address is the token transferred, and the raw amount field is the amount of tokens transferred. Note, this table does not contain ERC-721 and ERC-1155 token transfers, instead please use `nft.ez_nft_transfers`. Additionally, this table does not contain transfers of the chain's native asset, instead please use `core.ez_native_transfers`.

BLOCK_NUMBER.name: BLOCK_NUMBER
BLOCK_NUMBER.comment: Also known as block height. The block number, which indicates the length of the blockchain, increases after the addition of each new block.

BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.name: BLOCK_TIMESTAMP
BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.comment: The date and time at which the block was produced.

TX_HASH.name: TX_HASH
TX_HASH.comment: Transaction hash is a unique 66-character identifier that is generated when a transaction is executed. This will not be unique in this table as a transaction could include multiple transfer events.

ORIGIN_FUNCTION_SIGNATURE.name: ORIGIN_FUNCTION_SIGNATURE
ORIGIN_FUNCTION_SIGNATURE.comment: The function signature of this transaction.

ORIGIN_FROM_ADDRESS.name: ORIGIN_FROM_ADDRESS
ORIGIN_FROM_ADDRESS.comment: The from address at the transaction level.

ORIGIN_TO_ADDRESS.name: ORIGIN_TO_ADDRESS
ORIGIN_TO_ADDRESS.comment: The to address at the transaction level.

CONTRACT_ADDRESS.name: CONTRACT_ADDRESS
CONTRACT_ADDRESS.comment: Contract address of the token being transferred.

FROM_ADDRESS.name: FROM_ADDRESS
FROM_ADDRESS.comment: The sending address of this transfer.

TO_ADDRESS.name: TO_ADDRESS
TO_ADDRESS.comment: The receiving address of this transfer. This can be a contract address.

RAW_AMOUNT_PRECISE.name: RAW_AMOUNT_PRECISE
RAW_AMOUNT_PRECISE.comment: The amount of tokens transferred returned as a string to preserve precision. This value is not decimal adjusted.

RAW_AMOUNT.name: RAW_AMOUNT
RAW_AMOUNT.comment: The amount of tokens transferred. This value is not decimal adjusted.

AMOUNT_PRECISE.name: AMOUNT_PRECISE
AMOUNT_PRECISE.comment: The decimal transformed amount for this token returned as a string to preserve precision. Tokens without a decimal adjustment will be nulled out here.

AMOUNT.name: AMOUNT
AMOUNT.comment: The decimal transformed amount for this token. Tokens without a decimal adjustment will be nulled out here.

AMOUNT_USD.name: AMOUNT_USD
AMOUNT_USD.comment: The amount in US dollars for this transfer at the time of the transfer. Tokens without a decimal adjustment or price will be nulled out here.

DECIMALS.name: DECIMALS
DECIMALS.comment: The number of decimal places this contract needs adjusted where token values exist. For example, use the decimal field to correctly transform raw amounts in ```fact_token_transfers```.

SYMBOL.name: SYMBOL
SYMBOL.comment: The symbol belonging to the address of the token

EZ_TOKEN_TRANSFERS_ID.name: EZ_TOKEN_TRANSFERS_ID
EZ_TOKEN_TRANSFERS_ID.comment: The unique identifier for each row in the table.

INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.name: INSERTED_TIMESTAMP
INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The utc timestamp at which the row was inserted into the table.

MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.name: MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP
MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The utc timestamp at which the row was last modified.

_INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.name: _INSERTED_TIMESTAMP
_INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.comment: This column is being removed for standardization purposes. Please update your queries to use the `modified_timestamp` column instead by March 10, 2025.

TOKEN_PRICE.name: TOKEN_PRICE
TOKEN_PRICE.comment: This column is being deprecated for standardization purposes. Please remove from your queries by March 10, 2025.

metadata.name: EZ_LENDING_REPAYMENTS
metadata.comment: This table contains transactions in which a borrower repays their loan (debt) across the ORBIT, JUICE AND INIT protocols.  Loans are repaid in the same asset borrowed, plus accrued interest. Borrowers can pay back their loan based on the USD price as they can borrow any of the available stable coins (USDC, DAI, USDT, etc.).

EVENT_NAME.comment: The decoded event name for a given event.

PLATFORM.comment: The specific protocol where lending event occurred.

PAYER.comment: The address that initiated the repayment.

BORROWER.comment: Address that initiated the borrow event.
